frago.description: frago is an agent OS. Three core systems: Run (task context), Recipe (reusable automation), Chrome CDP (browser control).

run.description: Persistent task context. Records logs, screenshots, outputs for a single exploration task.

recipe.description: Metadata-driven reusable automation scripts. Three runtimes: chrome-js, python, shell.

chrome.description: CDP browser automation. 25+ commands for navigation, interaction, extraction, screenshots.

conventions.run_description: Run description MUST be in English. It becomes the directory slug via python-slugify — Chinese characters convert to pinyin, producing unreadable names.
